---
title: "Analyse_Releves_PP"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-29"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Import librairies
```{r}
#importation tidyverse

library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)

```

## Import données

```{r}
Tidy_Releves_PP <- read_csv("Data/Tidy_Releves_PP.csv")
View(Tidy_Releves_PP)
```
